title: I built a real-time AI hardware alert system because I kept missing Raspberry Pi / GPU restocks
body:
I kept missing SBC and GPU restocks by minutes or hours, especially for things like Raspberry Pi 5 / Radxa / RTX cards.

So I built a small system that:
- detects real stock availability (not fake listings)
- filters out overpriced/scalper inventory
- only alerts when confidence is high

Example alert:

🚨 HARDWARE OPPORTUNITY DETECTED
Raspberry Pi 5 8GB
Price: $79.95
Score: 15/20
Confidence: 6/6

STATUS: → IN STOCK

WHY REAL OPPORTUNITY:
• rare availability window
• different from normal listings
• may not last long

I’m currently testing it with a small group of users.

If you want early access, I can add a few testers.

title: Real-time alerts for homelab SBC restocks - caught Pi5 drop today
GPU/SBC availability intel - no more scalper FOMO for LocalLLaMA setups
SBC restock alerts - Pi5/Rock5 intel for builders
